response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified two distinct musical performances by Hololive VTubers Shirakami Fubuki and Amane Kanata.
2. Song 1 ('Mei Tantei Renzoku Satsujin Jiken') metadata was identified from on-screen text and confirmed through web search. Lyrics were found for Teniwoha's original version.
3. Song 2 ('Kokoro Okashi') was explicitly credited to Botchi Boromaru in the video. Lyrics were found via search for '心をかし ぼっちぼろまる'.
4. Constructed JSON mapping scene timestamps to song details and lyrics.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley featuring performances by VTubers Shirakami Fubuki and Amane Kanata, separated by a brief animation/narrative interlude.

scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki and Amane Kanata perform 'Mei Tantei Renzoku Satsujin Jiken' in a 3D library setting. The song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
名探偵連続殺人事件
名探偵連続殺人事件

悪漢ベヰカーストリヰト雷雨 七つ道具は質屋へ
悪路井戸落とされ探偵がまた一人姿を消したといふ
綾なす辻のAlice側 横溝掃除は江戸川か
神田最弱探偵さん こんなんどう？ 居ると思う？

「でも、それならどうしてあたしだけが無事だったんでしょうか？」
「と、云うと……？」
「あまりに無能すぎるが故に、きみは探偵として勘定にも入れられていなかったのだ!」
「いーやー!」
おさげ揺らす探偵さん
『探偵さん!』
(あくまで全て憶測に過ぎない点に注意。)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The great detectives' serial murder case
The great detectives' serial murder case

Street of thugs, Baker Street, thunderstorm, seven tools pawned off
They are dropped into the bad road, and another detective disappears
The Alice side that weaves together, is Yokomizo's cleaning Edogawa's?
Greatest detective in Kanda, what do you think of this? Do you think they are there?

"But then why was I the only one who was safe?"
"What do you mean by that...?"
"Because you are too incompetent, you weren't even counted as a detective!"
"No!" The detective who shakes her pigtails, "Detective!" 
(This is all based on speculation.)

scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki and Amane Kanata perform 'Kokoro Okashi' on a 3D stage. The song title appears at the top.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あぁ 恋に落ち たまゆら 開花 止まらないや
何度も捲って心をかし
泣いてばっかだったの
それがどうだ今や
腹捩るくらい笑う
ずっと一緒に笑って心をかし
ずっと一緒に笑う
最後の日を笑う

きみが持ってる白い花に
あたし見合わない
悲しくなる
無垢な恋とか 正しさとか
誰も教えてくれなかった

昨日会ったばっかで
今日またどっか会えたら
なんて思う暮らし
慎ましいくらいよね
全部許されたの
びっくりしちゃって
涙あふれてたよ

もう愛になる花歌
透き通った空
手をつないでた
夢のしるし

どんな前世だってさ
忘れたっていいんだ
きみと笑えるなら

心が触れるたび 綺麗な音鳴る
目と目が合ってくすぐったいね
なんでもないこと妙にツボるね
全部教えてくれて
ありがとう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, the fleeting moment I fell in love, the blooming won't stop
Flipping through it again and again, the heart is interesting
I was always crying, but what about now?
I laugh until my sides hurt, always laughing together
The heart is interesting, always laughing together
Laughing on the last day

I won't meet the white flower you hold
It makes me sad
Innocent love or righteousness
No one taught me either

I met you just yesterday
If I could meet you somewhere today
What a way to live, thinking that
It's quite reserved, isn't it?
Everything was forgiven
I was surprised
Tears overflowing

The flower song that is now love
The sky that has become clear
Hand in hand
A sign of a dream

Whatever the past life is
It's okay if I forgot it
If I can laugh with you

Every time our hearts touch, a beautiful sound rings
When our eyes meet, it tickles, doesn't it?
I'm strangely drawn to trivial things
Everything you taught me, thank you.
